name: Triple Barrels!
description: A Bandit shotgun built around a triple-barrel layout that dumps extra shells with every trigger pull. It follows the usual Bandit formula of heavy recoil and a slower fire rate in exchange for strong damage and a roomy magazine. The extra ammo cost makes it wasteful, but it hits hard enough to justify that appetite.
notes: Consumes 3 shells per shot. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
